name: context-passport
description: Create portable context handoff packs for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Move AI work between tools without losing context.
interface.longDescription: Context Passport converts long AI conversations and agent sessions into structured, portable handoff packs for ChatGPT, Claude, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, and other AI tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a Context Passport for this conversation or project.
